screen.superpipeslide.pipe_appearance.in: No block item found in inventory
screen.superpipeslide.pipe_appearance.ri: This modded block may use unusual model or texture rules.
This texture may come from a complex model and can map unexpectedly.
This material may include transparency or special render behavior.
The requested block texture could not be resolved normally.
Confirm that you know this may look different on pipes.
screen.superpipeslide.pipe_appearance.dy: Copy the selected block texture without recoloring.
Apply a simple color multiplication over the source texture.
Recolor with one color while preserving the source texture's lightness and surface detail.
Shift the source texture toward the chosen hue while keeping its original brightness, saturation, and multi-color relationships.
Map darker texels to the dark color and brighter texels to the light color for a clean two-color material.
Map shadow, midtone, and highlight regions to three selected colors for richer styled coatings.
Recolor neutral body areas while preserving strong original accent colors, useful for ores and decorative blocks.
Detect the source texture's body, texture detail, and accent regions, then rebuild it with one to five theme colors. Fewer colors are steadier; more colors are more controllable.
screen.superpipeslide.pipe_appearance.pa: Extract a suggested color count and default theme colors from the current texture.
Try to preserve small, saturated, or glow-like accent regions from the source texture.
